target: Whole-machine sweep: terse, truthful, portable. Zero fiction/external-naming; thin commands; no duplication.

canonical.law: Machine law in agents/default.md; project layer in /.machine/ (agent.md, project.md single file, glossary.csv, personas/).
canonical.sole_driver_rule: One session drives this loop (see glossary: sole driver).
canonical.note: superpowers:* and plugin-namespaced skills are REAL (plugin registry) — do not flag them as fiction. /oil is a skill (skills/oil/), not a command; it replaced /bootstrap and absorbed install/update/re-index.
